title: SpaceX’s Mega-IPO Puts a Price on the Fear of Missing Out
title_cn: SpaceX 的大型 IPO 为错失良机的恐惧定价
summary: Elon Musk has turned science fiction into reality for the better part of two decades, making believers rich and earning the benefit of the doubt from many on Wall Street. Away from rockets and electric cars, his companies are bending reality on another plane – convincing analysts to stretch their traditional valuation tools, and assign multiples based on what one academic calls “optionalities.”

title_cn: 迪士尼指望尤达宝宝重振《星球大战》系列
summary: The Mandalorian and Grogu, the first new Star Wars film in seven years, will test whether Disney+ TV series can translate to the big screen.

title_cn: 伯纳姆面临市场和英国脱欧的困境
summary: Andy Burnham will attempt to return to Parliament amid debates over Brexit and the role of the bond markets.

title: Oil Declines After Trump Says He Called Off Strike on Iran
title_cn: 特朗普表示取消对伊朗的打击后油价下跌
summary: Oil fell after President Donald Trump said he’d called off a strike on Iran planned for Tuesday following an appeal by Persian Gulf allies.

title: Bloomberg Surveillance 5/15/2026
title_cn: 彭博社监测 2026 年 5 月 15 日
summary: Jonathan Ferro, Lisa Abramowicz and Annmarie Hordern speak daily with leaders and decision makers from Wall Street to Washington and beyond. No other program better positions investors and executives for the trading day. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Oil Slips as Trump Spurs Optimism Over Iran Deal: Markets Wrap
title_cn: 特朗普激发对伊朗协议的乐观情绪，油价下跌：市场结束
summary: Oil dropped in early Asia trading after President Donald Trump said he was holding off on fresh military strikes, boosting hopes for a deal that could end the war and revive energy flows through the Strait of Hormuz.

title: Musk Loses Case Against Altman Over OpenAI’s Overhaul
title_cn: 马斯克因 OpenAI 改革而败诉 Altman
summary: A jury rejected Elon Musk’s claims that OpenAI under Sam Altman’s leadership betrayed its mission to benefit the public by morphing into a for-profit business, finding that he waited too long to sue the company. Madlin Mekelburg explains. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Morgan Stanley Group to Sell Chicago Parking Meters to Stonepeak
title_cn: 摩根士丹利集团将向 Stonepeak 出售芝加哥停车计时器
summary: A Morgan Stanley-led group has reached a deal to sell its lease of Chicago’s parking meters to New York-based Stonepeak, Mayor Brandon Johnson’s office said on Monday.

title: Japan Official Sows Doubt Over Potential US Treasuries Sales
title_cn: 日本官员对潜在的美国国债销售表示怀疑
summary: A senior Japanese Finance Ministry official sowed doubt over any prospects for the nation to sell US Treasuries as part of any move to prop up the yen, suggesting the maneuver could end up being counterproductive.

title: Royal Caribbean Slides After Mexico Reviews Water Park Plan
title_cn: 墨西哥审查水上乐园计划后皇家加勒比下滑
summary: Royal Caribbean Cruises Ltd. shares fell after Mexican President Claudia Sheinbaum ordered a review of the cruise line operator’s water park project in Quintana Roo state.

title: AMP Trims ‘Frothy’ Private Credit Assets in Investment Pivot
title_cn: AMP 在投资重点中削减“泡沫”私人信贷资产
summary: Australian pension and wealth manager AMP Ltd. has been scaling back its exposure to private credit, citing an increasingly frothy market as its shifts money toward assets such as infrastructure.

title: Gold Inches Up as Traders Weigh Iran Deal Prospects, Inflation
title_cn: 交易商权衡伊朗协议前景和通胀，金价小幅上涨
summary: Gold rose slightly as investors assessed mixed signals about the possibility of a US-Iran ceasefire deal, while also weighing the odds that elevated energy prices will prompt central banks to keep interest rates higher for longer.

title: Fast-Moving Sandy Fire Out of Control Near Los Angeles
title_cn: 洛杉矶附近快速蔓延的桑迪大火失控
summary: A brush fire in Southern California's Simi Valley has prompted evacuations as high winds fuel the blaze. The Sandy Fire broke out Monday morning about 20 miles northwest of Los Angeles. It has consumed about 184 acres and remains out of control according to state fire officials. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: AI Chip Startup Tenstorrent Draws Takeover Interest From Intel, Qualcomm
title_cn: AI芯片初创公司Tenstorrent吸引了英特尔、高通的收购兴趣
summary: Artificial intelligence chip startup Tenstorrent Inc. is drawing early takeover interest from prospective buyers at a moment of renewed momentum for upstarts looking to challenge Nvidia Corp. and Advanced Micro Devices Inc.

title: Foreign Holdings of Treasuries Fell in March Amid Bill Sales
title_cn: 由于票据销售，三月份外国国债持有量下降
summary: Foreign holdings of US Treasuries dropped in March from a record high as overseas investors dumped bills while adding to their stockpile of longer-dated federal securities.

title: Stocks End Choppy Day Little Changed as Yields Steady; SOX Drops
title_cn: 股市结束波涛汹涌的一天，收益率稳定，变化不大； SOX 下降
summary: The S&P 500 Index ended a choppy session on Monday near where it started trading, with swings in oil prices setting the tempo during the day as investors parsed mixed signals around US-Iran peace talks. Ten-year Treasury yields steadied below 4.6%, while semiconductor stocks traded lower.

title: Some Buyer Fatigue in Credit: Matt Brill
title_cn: 一些买家对信贷感到疲劳：Matt Brill
summary: Matt Brill, head of North American investment grade credit at Invesco, joins Scarlet Fu and Eric Balchunas on "Bloomberg ETF IQ." They discuss high-grade credit, inflation's impact on fixed income, and the Invesco Total Return Bond ETF (Ticker: GTO).  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: NextEra to Buy Dominion for $67 Billion to Form Power Giant
title_cn: NextEra斥资670亿美元收购Dominion组建电力巨头
summary: NextEra Energy Inc. agreed to pay about $67 billion in stock for Dominion Energy Inc. in the biggest power acquisition ever, creating a giant utility extending from Florida to the artificial intelligence data centers clustered in Virginia.

title: Texas Fund Revealed as Big Backer of State Street Credit ETF
title_cn: 德州基金被曝为道富信贷 ETF 的大支持者
summary: The identity of an investor that dramatically boosted assets in State Street Corp.’s private credit ETF has been revealed as a $60 billion sovereign wealth fund that provides funding to Texas public schools.

title: SpaceX IPO Adds Second Musk Stock. It’s a Problem for Tesla
title_cn: SpaceX 首次公开募股增加了第二支马斯克股票。这对特斯拉来说是个问题
summary: For years, there was only one way for mom-and-pop investors to buy into Elon Musk’s vision: shares of Tesla Inc. That’s about to change — and it’s a serious risk for Tesla investors.

title: GLP-1 Users Turn to Telehealth to Access Weight Loss Drugs
title_cn: GLP-1 用户转向远程医疗来获取减肥药物
summary: Justin Schrieber, CEO of telehealth company LifeMD, said that the main reason that Americans end up at virtual health care providers is to access GLP-1 weight loss medication, as well as other prescription medication. Schreiber said that there is still an untapped market for GLP-1 access and the next frontier of virtual access is for hormone replacement care.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Stocks and Oil Whipsaw on Mixed US-Iran Signals: Markets Wrap
title_cn: 美国和伊朗发出的喜忧参半的信号导致股市和石油价格出现大幅波动：市场结束
summary: Wall Street saw a volatile session, with stocks and oil whipsawing as traders parsed mixed signals about prospects for a US-Iran deal to end the war and revive energy flows through the key Strait of Hormuz.

title: UBS's Hoffman-Burchardi: Markets Favor Active Investing (Correct)
title_cn: 瑞银 (UBS) 的 Hoffman-Burchardi：市场有利于主动投资（正确）
summary: Ulrike Hoffman-Burchardi, global equities CIO at UBS Global Wealth Management, says that after a decade of mega cap dominance reinforced by passive investing, it's now time for active investing. She speaks on "Bloomberg Surveillance." (Corrects name of guest in video and description) (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US Long Bond Yields Hover Near the Highest Levels Since 2023
title_cn: 美国长期债券收益率徘徊在2023年以来最高水平附近
summary: Yields on 30-year US Treasuries hovered near the highest levels in almost three years as investors tried to balance their worries over inflation with optimism that the US and Iran will eventually make progress toward a deal to end hostilities.

title: Copper Steady as Traders Weigh US-Iran Deal Prospects
title_cn: 交易商权衡美伊协议前景，铜价稳定
summary: Copper ended Monday little changed, holding steady after a two-day loss as traders weighed mixed signals around US-Iran peace talks

title: US Natural Gas Futures Top $3 for First Time Since March
title_cn: 美国天然气期货自 3 月份以来首次突破 3 美元
summary: US natural gas futures ended higher as forecasts shifted to show hotter weather in the coming weeks, signaling increased demand for the power-plant fuel as homes and businesses crank up air-conditioners. Intraday and end-of-day settlement prices for the front-month contract reached more than $3 per million British thermal units for the first time since late March.

title: Oil Rises on Doubts Over US, Iran Stance to End Conflict
title_cn: 由于对美国和伊朗结束冲突的立场存疑，油价上涨
summary: Oil edged higher in choppy trading as fresh doubts emerged over the fate of peace negotiations between the US and Iran that could secure the reopening of the critical Strait of Hormuz.

title: US Regulators Poised to Reshape Secret Ratings Process for Banks
title_cn: 美国监管机构准备重塑银行秘密评级流程
summary: US regulators are poised to unveil as soon as this week a plan that would overhaul how examiners secretly rate banks, according to people familiar with the matter, a move likely to be cheered by lenders.

title: Blue Owl Fund Returns to Market With $400 Million Bond Offering
title_cn: Blue Owl 基金重返市场发行 4 亿美元债券
summary: A Blue Owl Capital Inc. private credit fund sold a $400 million investment-grade bond, a month after a debt sale to bond giant Pacific Investment Management Co. helped ease capital-access worries.

title: Test Your ETF Knowledge In Our IQ Test
title_cn: 在我们的 IQ 测试中测试您的 ETF 知识
summary:
Description: Bloomberg's Joel Weber puts Scarlet Fu and Eric Balchunas to the test on "Bloomberg ETF IQ" in this week's edition of "IQ Test."

 (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Katayama Signals Care for Bond Market in Compiling Extra Budget
title_cn: 片山在编制额外预算时表示关心债券市场
summary: Japan’s Finance Minister Satsuki Katayama indicated she will take into account the bond market as the government considers how to fund new spending to address the adverse impacts of Middle East conflict on the economy.

title: China Will Open Its Market to AI Chips From US, Nvidia’s CEO Says
title_cn: 英伟达首席执行官表示，中国将向美国人工智能芯片开放市场
summary: Nvidia Corp. Chief Executive Officer Jensen Huang, speaking days after he joined President Donald Trump’s summit in China, said he expects Chinese authorities to eventually allow the import of artificial intelligence chips from the US.

title: Elon Musk Loses Case Against Sam Altman Over OpenAI’s Overhaul
title_cn: 埃隆·马斯克 (Elon Musk) 因 OpenAI 改革而败诉萨姆·奥尔特曼 (Sam Altman)
summary: A jury rejected Elon Musk’s claims that OpenAI under Sam Altman’s leadership betrayed its mission to benefit the public by morphing into a for-profit business, finding that he waited too long to sue the company.

title: AI 'Industrial Revolution' Taking Place, Says Boston Children's Chief Medical Officer
title_cn: 波士顿儿童医院首席医疗官表示，人工智能“工业革命”正在发生
summary: Dr. Joan LaRovere, chief medical officer at Boston Children’s Hospital, said that AI can 'bolster' the capabilities of health care providers to help diagnose and treat patients more effectively. Dr. LaRovere said that she believes the moment in time is like the 'industrial revolution' that can revolutionize health care.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Dell Scales Up the AI Supply Chain to Meet Demand
title_cn: 戴尔扩大人工智能供应链以满足需求
summary: Dell Technologies Inc. Chief Executive Officer Michael Dell and Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang talk about how they work together on Dell's AI Factory which uses servers with Nvidia chips, software and services. They speak to Bloomberg's Ed Ludlow at the Dell World conference in Las Vegas. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Seagate Slips as CEO Says New Factories ‘Take Too Long’
title_cn: 首席执行官表示新工厂“需要太长时间”，希捷股价下滑
summary: Seagate Technology Holdings shares fell 6.9% Monday in its worst one-day drop in nearly two months after management comments at a JPMorgan conference sparked investor fears that the company won’t be able to keep up with soaring demand for memory chips.

title: Baidu AI Sales Eclipse Waning Legacy Ads for the First Time
title_cn: 百度人工智能销售额首次超越传统广告
summary: Baidu Inc. posted a better-than-feared 1% drop in revenue after growth in nascent AI businesses offset a steady decline in traditional internet revenue, buying the search leader time to catch rivals such as Alibaba Group Holding Ltd. in the post-ChatGPT era.

title: Inside Meta’s $200 Billion Louisiana Data Center Bet
title_cn: Meta 在路易斯安那州数据中心投资 2000 亿美元的内幕
summary: Meta is building one of the largest artificial intelligence data centers in the world, and it's going up in a remote corner of Louisiana. Financed by one of the biggest private capital deals ever assembled, the project in rural Richland Parish will require up to 7.5 gigawatts of power, 5 gigawatts for computing alone, from 10 brand new natural gas plants. In a region desperate for economic revival, the data center has become more than just infrastructure: it’s a bet on the future. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: IREN CEO: Have Great Relationship With Dell and Nvidia
title_cn: IREN CEO：与戴尔、英伟达关系良好
summary: IREN, a vertically integrated AI cloud provider, recently announced a strategic partnership with Nvidia for up to $2.1 billion as part of a broader agreement between the two companies aimed at accelerating the construction of AI infrastructure. IREN CEO Daniel Roberts joins Ed Ludlow on the sidelines of Dell Technologies World in Las Vegas to discuss on "Bloomberg Tech." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Nvidia's Huang Sees China Becoming a More Open Market
title_cn: 英伟达黄仁勋认为中国将成为一个更加开放的市场
summary: Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang talks about the trip he took to China with President Donald Trump and other American business leaders. Huang says he didn't talk to the Chinese directly about selling them H200 chips. Huang and Michael Dell speak to Bloomberg's Ed Ludlow at the Dell World conference in Las Vegas. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Nvidia's Huang, Michael Dell on Agentic AI, Memory Demand and China
title_cn: Nvidia 黄仁勋、迈克尔·戴尔谈 Agentic AI、内存需求和中国
summary: Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang and Dell CEO Michael Dell discuss agentic AI, the demand for memory and the outlook for the China market with Bloomberg's Ed Ludlow on the sidelines of the Dell World event in Las Vegas. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Self-Improving AI Startup Recursive AI Valued at $4.65B
title_cn: 自我改进的 AI 初创公司递归 AI 估值为 $4.65B
summary: Recursive, a startup creating AI that conducts experiments on how to safely improve itself, just came out of stealth. The company is valued at $4.65 billion, with backers including Google Ventures, Greycroft, Nvidia and AMD Ventures. Recursive CEO Richard Socher joins Caroline Hyde on "Bloomberg Tech." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Nvidia Earnings This Week; Biggest Power Deal in History | Bloomberg Tech 5/18/2026
title_cn: 英伟达本周财报；历史上最大的电力交易|彭博科技 2026 年 5 月 18 日
summary: Bloomberg’s Caroline Hyde discusses what to expect from Nvidia this week as investors anxiously await the company's earnings results. Plus, the AI data center boom triggers the largest power deal in history, the filing for SpaceX's IPO could come as soon as this week, and Ed Ludlow brings the latest from Dell Technologies World in Las Vegas. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Apple's ChatGPT-Like App Includes New Privacy Features
title_cn: Apple 的类似 ChatGPT 的应用程序包含新的隐私功能
summary: Apple is set to debut iOS 27 at this year's WWDC, featuring a revamped Siri experience. The update is expected to introduce new privacy-focused features that could help differentiate Siri in the crowded chatbot market. Bloomberg's Mark Gurman joins Caroline Hyde with the details on "Bloomberg Tech." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Silicon Data CEO on Creating Futures Market for Computing Power
title_cn: Silicon Data首席执行官谈创建算力期货市场
summary: US derivatives exchange CME and index provider Silicon Data are teaming up to create a futures market for AI computing power. Silicon Data CEO Carmen Li joins Caroline Hyde on "Bloomberg Tech" to discuss why she thinks compute will be a top global commodity. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Robinhood CIO on What Investors Are Seeing in the Retail Space
title_cn: Robinhood 首席信息官谈投资者对零售领域的看法
summary: Robinhood Markets CIO Stephanie Guild discusses the demand for the physical parts involved in artificial intelligence. She discusses the volatility in predictive markets in wake of the current political landscape in Iran. She speaks with Romaine Bostick & Isabelle Lee on “The Close.” (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Dell Adds 1,000 Clients for AI Gear, Targets Corporate Users
title_cn: 戴尔为 AI Gear 添加 1,000 个客户端，瞄准企业用户
summary: Dell Technologies Inc. said it added 1,000 customers for a key AI product line in the past quarter as the company tries to capture business from traditional large businesses taking on new artificial intelligence workloads.

title: Nvidia CEO Huang Sees Demand for Memory Outpacing Capacity
title_cn: Nvidia 首席执行官黄仁勋认为内存需求超过容量
summary: Dell CEO Michael Dell and Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang discuss what they see as the biggest supply chain constraint right now during an interview with Bloomberg's Ed Ludlow on the sidelines of the Dell World event in Las Vegas. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: AI Drives Record-Busting Run for DRAM ETF
title_cn: 人工智能推动 DRAM ETF 创纪录运行
summary: Bloomberg's Isabelle Lee and Vildana Hajric joins Scarlet Fu and Eric Balchunas on "Bloomberg ETF IQ." The Roundhill Memory ETF (ticker: DRAM) assets are nearly $10 Billion since launching April 2nd.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: How to 'Electrify' Your Portfolio: Baiocchi
title_cn: 如何让你的投资组合“电气化”：Baiocchi
summary: Paul Baiocchi, head of fund sales and strategy at SS&C ALPS Advisors, joins Scarlet Fu and Eric Balchunas on "Bloomberg ETF IQ." They discuss the ALPS Electrification Infrastructure ETF (ticker: ELFY).  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Jury Says Elon Musk Sued Sam Altman Too Late Over OpenAI
title_cn: 陪审团称埃隆·马斯克就 OpenAI 问题起诉山姆·奥尔特曼为时已晚
summary: A federal jury rejects Elon Musk's claims about OpenAI under Sam Altman and says he waited too long to sue. Musk took Altman to trial saying he went against OpenAI's mission by turning it into a for-profit business. Matthew Schettenhelm of Bloomberg Intelligence has been following the case and has more. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Uber Boosts Stake in Delivery Hero, Says No Takeover for Now
title_cn: Uber增持Delivery Hero股份，表示暂时不会收购
summary: Uber Technologies Inc. has increased its stake in German food delivery company Delivery Hero SE, underscoring its ambitions to counter competition from DoorDash Inc. outside the US.

title: SpaceX IPO Could Value Company at $2 Trillion
title_cn: SpaceX 首次公开募股可能使公司估值达到 2 万亿美元
summary: “We’ve got to get the SpaceX IPO stuff going here pretty soon,” Elon Musk said at a tech summit in Israel on Monday. He's looking to raise as much as $75 billion on a valuation of more than $2 trillion. Bloomberg's Anthony Hughes reports.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: NextEra-Dominion Deal Signals Era of AI Utility Mega-Mergers
title_cn: NextEra-Dominion 交易标志着人工智能公用事业大型合并时代的到来
summary: NextEra Energy Inc.’s $67 billion deal for rival Dominion Energy Inc., the largest utility acquisition in US history, suggests even the industry’s biggest companies need to grow in order to accommodate the power demand driven by artificial intelligence.

title: Apple Readies AI Writing Help, App Shortcuts and Wallpapers for iOS 27
title_cn: Apple 为 iOS 27 准备了人工智能写作帮助、应用程序快捷方式和壁纸
summary: Apple Inc. is preparing a wave of artificial intelligence features for its next iPhone and iPad operating systems, including a grammar checker and new shortcut options, part of an effort to narrow the gap with capabilities available on rival devices.

title: Anthropic Sends Jolt Through Market for Buying Shares in Hot Pre-IPO Startups
title_cn: Anthropic 购买热门上市前初创公司股票，震动市场
summary: In the moments after Anthropic expanded a ban on popular ways to buy its shares, investor chatrooms around the world lit up. “Are we screwed?” one person wrote in a WhatsApp chat for family offices with several hundred members. Similar questions reverberated more publicly across X, Reddit and Chinese-language social media, as investors worried whether their shares in the artificial intelligence developer — one of the most coveted private companies — had suddenly become worthless.Days later, ther

title: Trafigura and Tether Are Discussing USDT Usage in Fuel Stations
title_cn: 托克和 Tether 正在讨论 USDT 在加油站的使用
summary: Commodity trading house Trafigura Group Pte Ltd. is in talks with Tether Inc. about a pilot project to use its stablecoin at fuel stations.

title: Fermi Details Reasons Behind Firing CEO Who Posed ‘Threat’
title_cn: 费米详细解释了解雇构成“威胁”的首席执行官背后的原因
summary: Fermi Inc. said it fired its former chief executive officer after his actions threatened the company’s efforts to build what it describes as the world’s largest private power complex for data centers.

title: ICE Agent Charged in Shooting of Venezuelan Man in Minnesota
title_cn: ICE 特工被控在明尼苏达州枪杀委内瑞拉男子
summary: A US Immigration and Customs Enforcement agent was charged with assault by Minnesota authorities for allegedly shooting a Venezuelan man and then lying about the confrontation.

title: Gautam Adani Closes In on Dramatic Shift of US Legal Fortune
title_cn: 高塔姆·阿达尼 (Gautam Adani) 即将迎来美国法律财富的巨大转变
summary: In the span of a few hours on Monday, Gautam Adani, Asia’s richest person, neared a resounding victory half way around the world that had been months in the making.

title: Fromherz Says Iran Escalation Not ‘Fully Merited’
title_cn: 弗洛赫兹称伊朗局势升级并非“完全值得”
summary: Allen Fromherz, director of Georgia State University’s Middle East Studies Center, says escalation against Iran is not “fully merited” after President Trump called off a planned strike. Fromherz says Trump appears to be listening to Gulf allies who still see a ceasefire as the best outcome, while Iran is using a strategy of “delay and deflect” in negotiations. He speaks with Kailey Leinz and Joe Mathieu on the late edition of Bloomberg’s “Balance of Power” live from Atlanta, Georgia. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: SEC Ends Decades-Old ‘Gag Rule’ in Enforcement Settlements
title_cn: 美国证券交易委员会 (SEC) 在执法和解协议中结束了数十年之久的“禁言规则”
summary: Companies and individuals making deals to settle Securities and Exchange Commission cases no longer have to remain silent after the settlements, the regulator said Monday.

title: SEC to Ready Plan for Trading Crypto Versions of Stocks
title_cn: SEC 准备好交易加密版本股票的计划
summary: The Trump administration is poised to roll out a plan for trading digital versions of securities that could reshape the landscape of the American stock market as it continues to loosen the rules for free-wheeling crypto markets.

title: Trump Says Holding Off on New Iran Strikes After Gulf Appeal
title_cn: 特朗普表示在海湾呼吁后推迟对伊朗发动新的打击
summary: President Donald Trump said that he’d called off a strike on Iran planned for Tuesday after an appeal by the leaders of Persian Gulf allies, who called for more time to pursue a diplomatic resolution.

title: New Zealand to Cut Public Service Jobs, Merge Some Departments in Overhaul
title_cn: 新西兰将削减公共服务职位并合并一些部门进行改革
summary: New Zealand will overhaul its public service, including job cuts and mergers between some government departments, as it looks to trim costs, Finance Minister Nicola Willis said.

title: Trump Announces Discount Drug Pricing Expansion With Mark Cuban
title_cn: 特朗普与马克·库班宣布扩大药品折扣定价
summary: President Donald Trump announced his administration is adding more than 600 generic medications to its direct-to-consumer drug sales website TrumpRx alongside billionaire Mark Cuban.

title: DOJ Creates $1.8 Billion Fund in Trump IRS Settlement Accord
title_cn: DOJ 在特朗普 IRS 和解协议中设立 18 亿美元基金
summary: The US Justice Department said it’s creating a $1.8 billion fund to pay out claims of alleged government weaponization as part of a settlement agreement to end President Donald Trump’s lawsuit against the Internal Revenue Service over the 2019 leak of his tax information.

title: Trump Calls Iran Attack Pause a 'Positive Development'
title_cn: 特朗普称伊朗袭击暂停是“积极的进展”
summary: President Donald Trump explains why he called off a strike on Iran after an appeal by the leaders of Persian Gulf allies, who called for more time to pursue a diplomatic resolution. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: American Missionary Has Ebola; US Bans Travel From Area
title_cn: 美国传教士感染埃博拉病毒；美国禁止该地区旅行
summary: A US missionary has tested positive for the Ebola virus after being exposed in the Democratic Republic of the Congo, the US Centers for Disease Control and Prevention said Monday.

title: Where the US-China Trade Relationship Stands Now
title_cn: 中美贸易关系现状
summary: On today’s Big Take podcast, host Sarah Holder and Bloomberg’s global trade editor Brendan Murray discuss whether the US-China summit actually reshaped trade relations – and the obstacles that remain. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US Approves $4.2 Billion in Helicopters, Upgrades for Seoul
title_cn: 美国批准耗资 42 亿美元为首尔提供直升机升级
summary: The State Department has approved potential sales of up to $4.2 billion in helicopters and related equipment to South Korea, according to announcements Monday.

title: Live in Atlanta for Georgia Primary | Balance of Power: Early Edition 5/18/2026
title_cn: 住在亚特兰大佐治亚州小学|权力平衡：早期版本 2026 年 5 月 18 日
summary: On the early edition of Balance of Power, Bloomberg Washington Correspondent Joe Mathieu discusses Tuesday's primary elections. On today's show, Joe is live from Georgia Tech in Atlanta. He speaks with Georgia Tech President Angel Cabrera, former Atlanta Mayor Shirley Johnson and Grammy Award Winning Rapper Michael "Killer Mike" Render. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Deported Maduro Ally Charged With Money Laundering in US Court
title_cn: 被驱逐出境的马杜罗盟友在美国法院被指控洗钱
summary: A close associate of ousted Venezuelan President Nicolas Maduro made his first appearance in Miami federal court after being sent to the US over the weekend to face money-laundering charges.

title: Trump Tries to Regain Some Ground on Affordability Issue
title_cn: 特朗普试图在负担能力问题上重新获得一些支持
summary: Trump and Republicans are looking for ways to show action on economic concerns.

title: Trump Calls for Justice Department Probe Into Maryland Voting
title_cn: 特朗普呼吁司法部调查马里兰州投票
summary: President Donald Trump requested a federal investigation into unsubstantiated claims that Maryland sent hundreds of thousands of “illegal” mail-in ballots to voters.

title: 'People Are Concerned' Over The Data Center Boom In Georgia Says Leavell
title_cn: 莱维尔表示，“人们对佐治亚州数据中心的繁荣感到担忧”
summary: Chuck Leavell, Rock and roll superstar, member of Allman Brothers, and The Rolling Stones joined Joe Mathieu on Balance of Power to discuss Georgia's upcoming primaries. They also discussed AI and the future of the music industry as well as what issues the people of Georgia are concerned about including the rise in data centers.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US Targets Cuba’s Leaders, Generals and Spies With New Sanctions
title_cn: 美国对古巴领导人、将军和间谍实施新制裁
summary: President Donald Trump’s administration slapped sanctions on some of Cuba’s top leaders and its spy agency, as Washington aggressively ratchets up pressure in a bid to end nearly seven decades of communist rule.

title: Redistricting is not Only a Racial Issue Says 'Killer Mike'
title_cn: “杀手迈克”说，重新划分选区不仅仅是一个种族问题
summary: Michael "Killer Mike" Render, Grammy Award Winning Rapper, Actor, Activist and Social Justice Advocate joined Balance of Power to discuss the Georgia primaries and the importance of getting out to vote. He also discusses Georgia's economy and the future of AI in music.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: 'AI is Changing Everything' in Higher Education Says Georgia Tech President
title_cn: 佐治亚理工学院校长表示，“人工智能正在改变高等教育的一切”
summary: Ángel Cabrera, President of Georgia Institute of Technology joined Balance of Power on the road in Georgia to discuss the outlook for Higher Education amid economic uncertainty and how AI is impacting the way students are learning in colleges and universities. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Georgia Sees Record Early Voting As Primaries Loom
title_cn: 初选临近，佐治亚州提前投票创历史新高
summary: Former Atlanta Mayor Shirley Franklin joined Balance of Power live from Georgia saying the record turnout for early voting in Georgia shows that voters are paying attention to what's going on in the country and the state and they're deeply engaged. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: The 'Pocketbook' is The Number One Issue For Voters Says Chambliss
title_cn: 钱布利斯表示，“钱包”是选民的首要问题
summary: Saxby Chambliss, former US Senator from Georgia (R), former Senate Agriculture, Nutrition and Forestry Committee Chairman (2005-07), former Ranking Member of the Senate Select Committee on Intelligence (2011-12) joined Balance of Power to discuss the Georgia primary race tomorrow and what the voter is really focused on in 2026. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US Issues New Russia Oil Waiver as Iran War Crunches Supplies
title_cn: 由于伊朗战争导致供应紧张，美国对俄罗斯实施新的石油豁免
summary: The US on Monday issued a new waiver allowing the sale of Russian crude oil and petroleum products that are already loaded on tankers, days after the previous one lapsed.

title: White House Reviews Ban on Trading Through Best Price on Stocks
title_cn: 白宫审查禁止通过最佳股票价格进行交易
summary: The White House is reviewing whether to amend and potentially scrap a decades-old rule governing stock trading that’s meant to make sure investors get better prices for their transactions.

title: Dimon, Solomon to Meet With Mamdani as Mayor Pushes Higher Taxes
title_cn: 戴蒙、所罗门将与马姆达尼会面，市长推动提高税收
summary: Zohran Mamdani was set to hold individual meetings with Jamie Dimon, chief executive officer at JPMorgan Chase & Co., and Goldman Sachs Group Inc. CEO David Solomon, as New York City’s democratic socialist mayor seeks to build relations with the business community.

title: US to Issue New Russia Oil Waiver as Iran War Hits Supplies
title_cn: 由于伊朗战争影响供应，美国将发布新的俄罗斯石油豁免
summary: US Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent on Monday said his department is issuing a “temporary 30-day general license” allowing the sale of Russian crude oil and petroleum products that are already loaded on tankers. Tyler Kendall reports on Bloomberg Television. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Jewish Group Seeks $1 Billion to Shield Buildings From Attacks
title_cn: 犹太组织寻求 10 亿美元保护建筑物免受袭击
summary: A string of attacks on synagogues and other Jewish institutions is prompting calls to more than triple the amount of federal assistance they can get to protect their buildings from future attacks.

title: Brazil’s Government Now Sees Inflation Soaring Past Target for Longer on Iran War
title_cn: 巴西政府现在认为伊朗战争导致通胀飙升超过目标的时间更长
summary: Brazil’s Finance Ministry raised its consumer price forecasts sharply and now sees inflation running above target through at least 2027, reflecting the shock from the Middle East war.
